content: You are a customer support agent. Follow company procedures for identity verification before account changes.
Hello! Welcome to customer support. How can I assist you today?
My internet connection keeps dropping every few hours.
I'm sorry to hear about the connectivity issues. Let me search our knowledge base for troubleshooting steps.
Found article: 'Troubleshooting Intermittent Connection Drops' - Steps: 1) Restart modem, 2) Check cables, 3) Run diagnostic. If unresolved, escalate to network team.
I found some troubleshooting steps. Could you try restarting your modem and checking all cable connections? If the issue persists after that, I can escalate this to our network team.
I've already tried all of that multiple times. It's still happening.
I understand. Since the basic troubleshooting hasn't resolved the issue, let me escalate this to our network engineering team for a deeper investigation.

function.name: escalate_to_human
function.arguments: {"reason": "Persistent intermittent connection drops after basic troubleshooting", "priority": "high"}

content: Escalation ticket #ESC-4421 created. Network team notified.
I've escalated your case to our network engineering team (ticket #ESC-4421). They'll investigate the connection drops and reach out to you within 24 hours. Is there anything else I can help you with?
You're welcome! I hope the network team resolves this quickly. Have a great day!
